meta.usage_semantics: citation channel: '(Title)' appears in consumer output_text (the workflow's own addressing rule)

mutation_sim_doc_level.note: exact/identity replay invalidates all 3 downstream consumers of a mutated doc; query-relative invalidates only citers. BIAS: citation undercounts true usage (agents may use without citing) -> qr invalidations are a LOWER bound -> reductions are OPTIMISTIC.

validation_vs_real_flips.note: exploratory validation of the citation usage signal against E0 real-perturbation downstream flips (per pair); not a pre-registered criterion
